creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 249219
POCL 5.0 Update: new version, fix docs, add experimental features, w/ commitafc5b38

Having trouble with LaTeX/PDF and creating the PDF document, adding the PDF is now optional

Added some experimental and unstable features (pocld, proxy).

The default builds now with my poudriere host with PDF disabled from clean. In case one tries to compile traditionally via make, with print/texlive-base already installed, creation of the .pdf file works.

In poudriere, the build always fails with missing path to "latexmk" binary.
